name: AI Streaming Chat (Vercel AI SDK)
description: Integrate the Vercel AI SDK to stream AI responses in real time. Includes useChat hook, streaming API route, message history, and abort handling. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Groq.

steps.description: Detect Next.js version and existing AI dependencies
Install Vercel AI SDK and OpenAI provider
Create streaming POST /api/chat route using streamText() with message history support
Create Chat component with useChat hook, message list, input form, and loading indicator
Create Message component with role-based styling (user vs assistant), markdown rendering
Add Chat component to the main page
Start dev server and verify streaming works end to end
